en: Or really, just give him a pomegranate enema instead.
Just shove a bottle of pomegranate juice up his ass and squeeze it, you'll be amazed at
ko: 석류 주스를 엉덩이에 넣고 짜면 놀라운 결과를 볼 수 있어요.
저는 그들의 주스를 뱀 기름이라고 언급했을 수도 있고,

en: I may or may not have then referred to their juice as snake oil, and encouraged viewers
ko: 그들의 주스를 뱀이라고 불렀을 수도 있고 아닐 수도 있어.

en: to put stickers on their bottles, suggesting their juice contains dogs.
Well, a few days after that segment aired, and this is true, POM Wonderful sent over
ko: 그 방송이 나간 며칠 후, 이건 사실이에요,

en: a tiny refrigerator and several cases of their dog juice, along with a letter.
They sent a letter, and I would like to read a little bit, if I may.
There's a full stop there, not an exclamation mark, and that's a key difference.
ko: 여기에는 느낌표가 아니라 마침표가 있어요. 그게 중요한 차이점이에요.

en: We did love the premiere of your show.
ko: 우리는 당신의 쇼 첫 방송을 정말 좋아했어요, 그건 알고 있어요.
